title: CT14 legal branch run — Aggregate closure
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT14 (Aggregate closure). A conforming run may use only CT14 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT14 (Aggregate closure); must equal "CT14".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT14 (Aggregate closure) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT14.N01 through CT14.N14; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT14 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT14 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT14 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
